title: Inception
description: A thief enters people's dreams to steal secrets and is given the task of planting an idea.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole in space to save humanity.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who brings chaos to Gotham City.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: The Avengers assemble one final time to reverse Thanos' actions and restore balance.

title: Titanic
description: A love story unfolds aboard the ill-fated RMS Titanic during its maiden voyage.

title: Joker
description: A troubled man descends into madness and becomes the infamous Joker.

title: Frozen
description: A princess sets out to find her sister, whose icy powers have trapped their kingdom.

title: Gladiator
description: A Roman general seeks revenge after being betrayed and enslaved.

title: Shrek
description: An ogre embarks on a journey to rescue a princess and reclaim his swamp.

title: The Matrix
description: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against machines.

title: Toy Story
description: Toys come to life and embark on an adventure when their owner is not around.

title: Up
description: An old man ties balloons to his house and flies to South America with a young scout.

title: Avatar
description: A marine explores an alien world and becomes part of the native Na'vi culture.

title: Black Panther
description: The king of Wakanda must defend his nation from internal and external threats.

title: Spider-Man
description: A teenager gains spider-like abilities and becomes a superhero.
